Who I am

A marketer who
thinks in systems

I’m a final-year Management and Marketing student at Indiana University’s O’Neill School — and I’ve never believed that creativity and analytics are opposites. My career so far has been proof of that.

At Sotheby’s International Realty, I researched and benchmarked luxury campaigns across three continents to position ultra-high-net-worth clients. At PayU, I dug into competitor pricing data and CRM pipelines to sharpen digital payment strategy. I’ve led a menstrual health NGO’s full rebrand on social media. And I built a lifestyle brand to 114K+ followers from scratch.

I’m drawn to roles where brand storytelling, audience psychology, and performance metrics all live in the same room.

Brand Strategy Content Marketing Social Media Growth Competitive Research Campaign Analytics Canva / CapCut Excel & CRM KPI Reporting Audience Targeting Brand Partnerships

Years of hands-on experience

Research Report
Synergies Between

An investigative study into the strategic alignment of private banking networks with India’s luxury real estate sector, focused on high-net-worth client acquisition and primary market expansion through Sotheby’s International Realty. Project 02

Fintech competitive
intelligence & data

Internship Project · 2024
Anahita Tripathi
Data & Competitive Analysis
Competitor Pricing
& Positioning
Report
Digital Payments · India
Built a comprehensive competitor pricing matrix for PayU’s digital payments portfolio, mapping merchant acquisition costs, fee structures, and value propositions across eight rival platforms. The analysis directly informed repositioning recommendations for two of PayU’s core product lines. CRM data accuracy improved by 30% through systematic Excel-based pipeline cleaning.

Anahita Tripathi
Creator Brand Strategy
0 → 114K:
Building a brand
people actually follow
@balancinglifewithnishu
✦
I concepted, launched, and scaled an independent lifestyle & wellness brand from zero to 114K+ followers — owning content strategy, visual identity, partnerships, and performance reporting end-to-end. The growth was organic, the voice was intentional, and the biggest reel crossed 2.1M views without paid amplification.

Campaign snapshot
Audience-building work for Balancing Life with Nishu — a lifestyle-led creator brand built through distinct voice, recognizable visuals, and a content mix that still felt human.
Why it worked
Voice + consistency
Not just aesthetics. The growth came from a recognizable tone, repeatable content pillars, and content that translated into community.
Brand outcome
114K+
A creator brand with reach, recall, and partnership potential — built to feel polished without losing personality.

Beyond the resume

A little more me

Still polished, just less formal — the side of me that cares about visual instinct, memorable details, and showing up with personality.

Memorable
on purpose.

Strong branding works the same way strong personal style does — it catches attention fast, stays distinct, and gives people something to remember.

Off-duty frame
Confident, playful, and put-together — the same energy I like in visual storytelling and brand work.
Quiet contrast
A cleaner, softer visual — still expressive, just with a little more restraint.

Strategy with style

I like marketing that feels sharp, visually memorable, and a little more considered than the usual. Clean enough for recruiters, personal enough to still sound like me.

Editorial edge
Personal style, polished
Professional, still me
Clear voice, no filler
